notes: Split the folder-picker into two dedicated buttons. Previously the single Pick-folder button morphed into 'Resume previous folder' when a saved handle was waiting for permission, which was easy to miss. Now: 'Resume previous folder' is its own full-width button at the top of the folder card; 'Pick folder' + 'Rescan' sit below as before. Resume is disabled by default (when there's no saved folder history) and only enables when the startup auto-restore finds a saved handle in 'prompt' permission state. Tapping Resume re-grants permission via user gesture and silently loads; tapping Pick always opens the fresh picker without overloading semantics.
